plugins.name: observational-memory
plugins.description: Automatic behavioral profiling for Claude Code sessions. Watches how you work, extracts patterns, and builds a portable behavioral profile that any AI agent can load.

plugins.name: mini-tdd-harness
plugins.description: Automated TDD harness — write test specs, have Claude Code implement them. Includes a skill for writing specs and a Go CLI for running them.

plugins.name: decompose-to-queue
plugins.description: Decompose high-level intents into atomic task files for the aq (jg-agent-queue) runner. Routes prescriptive work to local pi/Qwen3, escalates judgment-heavy work back to Claude.
